name: lish-site

scripts.predev: lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :3002 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :1337 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :3004 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; pkill frpc 2>/dev/null; echo 'Ports 3000-3002, 1337, 3004 cleared, frpc killed'
scripts.dev:strapi: cd cms/strapi && pnpm exec strapi develop --no-watch-admin
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others -n next,api,strapi,nginx,frpc -c blue,green,cyan,magenta,yellow "pnpm dev:next" "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:strapi" "pnpm dev:nginx" "pnpm dev:frpc"
scripts.start:strapi: cd cms/strapi && pnpm exec strapi start
scripts.build:strapi: cd cms/strapi && pnpm exec strapi build
scripts.start: concurrently -n next,api,strapi -c blue,green,cyan "pnpm start:next" "pnpm start:api" "pnpm start:strapi"
scripts.test:e2e: echo 'E2E tests not yet implemented.' && exit 1

dependencies-comments: We pin all dep versions (no ~ or ^, etc.); avoids last-minute breaks; then, we upgrade periodically and test extensively
